slices.summary: Caleb completed a full personal intake: 40, geography BA, ISFJ, 8-year floodplain specialist at Harris County Flood Control. Covered family (wife Lena, mother Dorothy), financial strain from home repairs and mother's care, stress-triggered acid reflux, storm-season anxiety, and his core goal of increasing flood mitigation adoption along a repeatedly flooded corridor in eastern Harris County.
open_loops: Follow up on mother Dorothy's health issues and medical appointment resistance
Address financial strain from recurring home repairs and thin savings
Monitor storm season anxiety and its impact on work and sleep
decisions: Save Caleb's complete personal profile as reference for future conversations
Provide practical, constraint-respecting assistance aligned with his preferences
Proactively monitor anxiety and sleep during storm season
